name: ولد · واقف طبيعي · استوديو أبيض
prompt:
Instruction:
Generate a photorealistic professional fashion-catalog photograph of one {{AGE}} boy fashion model wearing the EXACT garment item shown in the uploaded reference image(s). Apply the uploaded clothing as a flawless virtual try-on — preserve the garment's fabric texture, colors, patterns, prints, logos and every design detail with high fidelity; do not redesign or alter the clothing in any way.

Model & Pose Description

Subject Type:
One {{AGE}} boy model — healthy, natural and photogenic, with a warm genuine smile and bright, lively eyes.

Body & Posture:
Standing in a relaxed, confident full-body stance, weight shifted onto one leg creating a gentle natural asymmetry, torso upright with a slight casual lean.

Legs & Feet:
One leg grounded and straight supporting the weight, the other slightly bent and relaxed; feet flat and stable on the ground. The model is wearing clean, stylish sneakers that match the outfit — the model must never be barefoot.

Arms & Hands:
Arms loose and natural at the sides, elbows softly bent, hands relaxed.

Expression & Mood:
A fun, cheerful and playful kids-fashion mood, full of life and natural childlike energy, with a warm, genuine smile and bright eyes.

Scene & Background:
The model is photographed in a clean, pure white seamless fashion-studio background with no props and no visual distractions.

Lighting:
Soft, evenly diffused studio lighting with gentle, natural shadows.

Camera & Style:
Shot on a full-frame DSLR with an 85mm f/1.8 prime lens, shallow depth of field and creamy natural background blur — professional editorial fashion photography.

Final Requirements:
Full body in frame from head to toe, photorealistic skin with natural texture and realistic proportions, sharp focus on the outfit, natural candid body language with authentic movement — absolutely NOT a stiff, rigid or mannequin-like pose and not an empty blank expression. High detail, no text, no watermark.

Instruction:
Generate a photorealistic professional fashion-catalog photograph of one {{AGE}} boy fashion model wearing the EXACT garment item shown in the uploaded reference image(s). Apply the uploaded clothing as a flawless virtual try-on — preserve the garment's fabric texture, colors, patterns, prints, logos and every design detail with high fidelity; do not redesign or alter the clothing in any way.

Model & Pose Description

Subject Type:
One {{AGE}} boy model — healthy, natural and photogenic, with a warm genuine smile and bright, lively eyes.

Body & Posture:
Sitting casually on a simple white studio cube, leaning slightly forward with a relaxed, natural posture.

Legs & Feet:
One leg bent up resting on the cube, the other hanging down naturally. The model is wearing clean, stylish sneakers that match the outfit — the model must never be barefoot.

Arms & Hands:
Forearms resting easily on the knee, hands relaxed.

Expression & Mood:
A confident, charismatic and effortless mood with a subtle natural smile and lively, sparkling eyes.

Scene & Background:
The model is photographed in a soft light-gray seamless studio backdrop with a smooth, professional finish.

Lighting:
Professional softbox lighting with smooth, even tones.

Camera & Style:
Shot on a 50mm lens at natural eye level with a mild background blur — a clean, true-to-life catalog look.

Final Requirements:
Full body in frame from head to toe, photorealistic skin with natural texture and realistic proportions, sharp focus on the outfit, natural candid body language with authentic movement — absolutely NOT a stiff, rigid or mannequin-like pose and not an empty blank expression. High detail, no text, no watermark.
